answer:
\boxed{B}

The recommended submersion time for NiTi files in **5.25% NaOCl at 122°F (50°C)** to prevent corrosion and maintain flexibility is **45 minutes**. Longer exposure (e.g., 2 hours) can weaken the alloy, while shorter times (e.g., 20 mins) may not fully disinfect. Always follow manufacturer guidelines for specific file types.
